choices.text: Tower (airport surface to ~3k ft), TRACON (terminal ~30 NM), Center/ARTCC (enroute, 20 in US). Continuous handoffs.
CRAFT: Clearance limit, Route, Altitude, Frequency (departure), Transponder code. Standardized. Read-back required.
7700 emergency, 7600 lost comm, 7500 hijack, 1200 VFR default. Squawking triggers ATC alert immediately.
ADS-B Out broadcasts GPS position 1Hz, 200+ NM range, 100× more accurate than radar. Required Jan 2020 controlled airspace. ADS-B In gives free weather + traffic. FAA decommissioning radar.

$35-40B FAA program: ADS-B (replacing radar), PBN (GPS waypoints replacing VOR), Data Comm (text-based ATC), SWIM (system data sharing), OPDs (continuous descents). UTM for drone integration. Decades-long transition.

questions.explanation: ADS-B + PBN + Data Comm + SWIM + UTM.
